blended.narrative: White Pass is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 1,978 ft.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 8" of heavy snow, highs of 33°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: 55.6" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is building — up 43" over the past week. Current depth: 92".
